text: The surgeon ties the purse string and performs the first wall shot of the rectal stump, followed by a circumferential full thickness rectotomy to free the rectal wall. A double continuous suture with a V-lock suture is then applied to reinforce the purse string, achieving complete inversion of the rectal mucosa and an airtight seal.
The surgeon performs a second generous washout of the pelvic cavity before proceeding with the dissection. The dissection advances from down to up through the total mesorectal excision (TME) plane.
